description: SFX manifest — maps sound keys to ElevenLabs-generated OGG files. Falls back to procedural if file missing.

menu_move.prompt: Satisfying arcade button click, solid mechanical switch press with a clean tactile pop, slot machine button

menu_select.prompt: Casino coin drop into metal tray, bright rewarding ching with a satisfying metallic resonance, slot machine payout coin

menu_cancel.prompt: Solid mechanical switch toggle off, firm click-clack rejection, arcade button releasing with a low snap

menu_expand.prompt: Playing card being dealt onto felt table, satisfying slap of cardboard on fabric, casino dealer flick

menu_open.prompt: Casino machine powering up, warm electronic hum with a confident ascending tone, inviting slot machine ready

advance_queue.prompt: Low caliber gunshot with a deep bass punch, suppressed pistol firing, short powerful thump with low-end boom, satisfying

advance_undo.prompt: Gun slide racking backward, mechanical metal slide retraction, weapon uncocking click-clack

defer.prompt: Shield being planted on stone ground, solid metal clunk of a guard bracing, firm defensive stance thud

player_turn.prompt: Two-note casino notification chime, confident ding-dong like a hotel bell, clear and present, attention getting

autobattle_on.prompt: Heavy industrial lever being pulled, solid mechanical clunk engaging with a confident ka-chunk, machine activated

autobattle_off.prompt: Heavy switch thrown to off position, solid mechanical disengagement clunk, power-down lever release

autobattle_open.prompt: Old computer terminal booting up, warm CRT monitor turning on with an electronic hum, retro tech startup

autobattle_close.prompt: CRT monitor powering off, electronic whine descending to silence, retro computer shutdown

chest_open.prompt: Treasure chest unlatching and creaking open, cascade of gold coins jingling inside, slot machine jackpot payout, rewarding

tier_zoom_out.prompt: Quick cinematic zoom out whoosh, camera pulling back smoothly, confident transition sweep

tier_zoom_in.prompt: Quick cinematic zoom in whoosh, camera pushing forward smoothly, confident transition sweep

speed_change.prompt: Ratchet clicking one notch forward, mechanical gear tooth engaging, satisfying single click of a dial turning

attack_hit.prompt: Quick satisfying sword swing and connect, clean blade whoosh followed by a tight pop impact, classic RPG melee hit, not heavy or harsh

attack_miss.prompt: Sword swinging through empty air, quick blade whoosh cutting nothing, clean miss

critical_hit.prompt: Devastating impact with a bass boom and bright metallic ring, powerful critical strike, satisfying crunch, dramatic

damage_taken.prompt: Punch landing on body armor, solid impact thud with a dull crunch, taking a hit

enemy_death.prompt: Monster dissolving into particles, crackling disintegration with a descending whoosh, defeated enemy vanishing

heal.prompt: Gentle wind chimes in a warm breeze, tinkling restoration with a rising shimmer, soothing healing sound

buff.prompt: Ascending harp glissando with a confident shimmer, magical power-up strengthening, encouraging upward sweep

debuff.prompt: Descending trombone wobble, weakening comical slide downward, stat reduced, deflating

victory.prompt: Triumphant brass fanfare melody, classic RPG victory jingle, celebratory horns and chimes, joyful short tune

defeat.prompt: Sad piano descending, somber game over melody, melancholic and fading to silence

status_poison.prompt: Toxic bubbling liquid, sickly gurgling potion, venomous dripping with a wet squelch

status_sleep.prompt: Music box winding down, sleepy descending lullaby notes, drowsy tinkling fading out slowly

status_confuse.prompt: Cartoon dizzy birds circling head, wobbly spiraling sound, comical disorientation, spinning stars

status_paralyze.prompt: Electric taser zap followed by frozen stillness, sharp static crackle then silence, stunning shock

phase_select.prompt: Clear bell ding, single clean notification chime, present and noticeable, like a service bell tap

phase_execute.prompt: Firm drum hit, single confident snare strike signaling go-time, decisive and authoritative

ability_fire.prompt: Roaring campfire erupting, warm crackling flames whooshing upward, deep orange fire with wood pops and snaps, cozy but powerful

ability_ice.prompt: Cracking frozen lake, sharp crystalline ice forming rapidly, cold brittle snapping with frosty wind howl, winter blizzard

ability_lightning.prompt: Close thunderclap with electric buzzing aftermath, raw thunder strike with static discharge crackling, stormy atmospheric

ability_holy.prompt: Cathedral pipe organ chord with heavenly choir voices, sacred resonant golden light, deep reverberant church acoustics, divine

ability_dark.prompt: Deep underground rumble with whispering ghostly voices, dark cavern echoing void, eerie low vibration with distant wailing

ability_physical.prompt: Quick clean sword unsheathing and slicing through air, sharp steel ring fading, precise blade technique

ability_heal.prompt: Gentle rain on leaves with harp notes, nature healing sounds, birdsong and dewdrops, peaceful restoration

screen_shake.prompt: Deep rumbling earthquake tremor, ground shaking impact with low bass vibration, dramatic cinematic rumble

screen_flash.prompt: Sharp thunder crack with bright flash impact, sudden lightning strike, dramatic cinematic hit

letterbox_in.prompt: Smooth cinematic curtain closing whoosh, subtle film projector engaging, quiet dramatic transition in

letterbox_out.prompt: Smooth cinematic curtain opening whoosh, subtle film projector disengaging, quiet dramatic transition out

cave_whispers.prompt: Eerie cave whispers echoing in darkness, ghostly murmuring voices in a deep cavern, unsettling ambient wind through stone tunnels

armor_clank.prompt: Medieval plate armor clanking together, metal gauntlet striking breastplate in salute, military honor gesture

sword_draw_heavy.prompt: Heavy two-handed greatsword being drawn from scabbard, long slow steel scraping against leather, weighty and deliberate unsheathe

sword_on_stone.prompt: Heavy sword being placed point-down on stone floor, metallic ring echoing in a hall, solemn weapon resting, armor settling

portal_activate.prompt: Magical portal opening with swirling energy hum, reality warping distortion building to a resonant tone, interdimensional gateway powering up

reality_glitch.prompt: Reality flickering and glitching, digital static mixed with broken record skipping, world tearing momentarily, unsettling distortion

lute_strum.prompt: Quick medieval lute chord strum, bright acoustic string pluck, bard playing a confident flourish, warm wooden instrument

goblin_fanfare.prompt: Comical goblin merchant entrance fanfare, silly kazoo and off-key trumpet, goofy carnival jingle, mischievous and funny

rat_king_squeak.prompt: Dramatic oversized rat squeaking menacingly, deep pitched rodent squeal building to a threatening screech, comically intimidating boss entrance
